scenes.text: You ever get stuck behind two cars that decided, at the exact same time, to go the exact same speed?
scenes.image_prompt: Aerial shot of two cars side by side on a highway going slow, one in each lane, both blocking traffic, late afternoon, cinematic wide shot

scenes.text: Both doing 45 in a 65. And behind them, a parade.
scenes.image_prompt: Long line of cars piling up behind two slow cars on a highway, frustrated drivers visible through windshields, golden hour, cinematic aerial view

scenes.text: You look left. Blocked. You look right. Blocked. You look at your clock. Late.
scenes.image_prompt: Driver's face showing disbelief, looking left then right rapidly, dashboard clock showing late time, natural car interior lighting, cinematic close-up

scenes.text: And then, after what feels like three calendar years, one of them pulls ahead by half a car length.
scenes.image_prompt: One car finally pulling slightly ahead of the other on the highway, tiny gap opening, dramatic lighting like a movie scene, cinematic slow motion feel

scenes.text: Freedom has never felt so dramatic.
scenes.image_prompt: Cars finally passing through the gap, driver's face showing exaggerated relief and joy, wind effect, golden hour highway, cinematic emotional
